subject: Wallpaper ingestion failure with 4K resolution payload

messages.content: Hey, I tried uploading a 4K wallpaper (Neon Glimmer) which is around 38MB, but it keeps failing at the resolution extraction phase. Help!

subject: Inconsistent billing cycle for premium subscription tier

messages.content: My subscription was renewed on May 28, but I received a notification saying my billing cycle is overdue. Can you check?

subject: Copyright take-down inquiry regarding uploaded asset id 8719

messages.content: Hello, my artwork is copyrighted, and I notice someone uploaded a replica under ID 8719. Please investigate.

subject: Requesting permission scope upgrade to uploader status

messages.content: I would like to apply for the Content Uploader role. Here is a link to my portfolio of digital illustration works.
Your portfolio has been reviewed and approved! Your account has been upgraded to Content Creator status.
